## Affected skill

- Skill name or path:
- NuRec Skills commit or version:
- Agent/runtime and version (for example, Codex, Claude Code, or Cursor):
- Upstream artifact and version, if applicable (container, model, dataset, or repository):

## Describe the bug

Describe what went wrong and which part of the skill or bundled helper is
affected. Usage questions belong on the
[NVIDIA Developer Forum](https://forums.developer.nvidia.com/c/omniverse/platform/nurec/752).

## Steps to reproduce

Provide the smallest prompt, command, or workflow that reproduces the problem.
Remove credentials, tokens, private data, and proprietary content before
posting.

1.

3.

## Expected behavior

Describe what you expected the skill or helper to do.

## Actual behavior

Describe what happened instead. Include relevant error messages or agent output.

## Environment

- Operating system and architecture:
- Python version, if applicable:
- GPU, driver, and CUDA versions, if applicable:
- Container image and tag, if applicable:

## Additional context

Add sanitized logs, screenshots, links to public upstream documentation, or
other context that may help reproduce the problem.
